_comment: Provenance + scan policy for the PostgreSQL binary that the embedded-postgres TEST dependency downloads at runtime. It lives OUTSIDE go.sum (Maven Central, not the Go module proxy), so it needs its own pin + scan. See deploy/supply-chain/README.md and docs/supply-chain.md.

checksum.policy: trust-on-first-use: scripts/supply-chain/verify-embedded-postgres.sh prints the SHA-256 on first run; a maintainer pins it here and commits, after which every CI run verifies it and fails the build if it ever changes for the pinned version.

scan.lastResult: pending first CI run on a network-enabled runner

notes: PostgreSQL 16.4 is a supported release. This dependency is integration-test only and is NOT bundled in the shipped distroless image (which carries only the Go binaries). It must be scanned before any redistribution that bundles it.
